summary: EXP-163 addresses all five c3 holes on SEC-6.5 FAIL-004. The two moderate holes (retroactive 3-month-rule sourcing and AAO-proxy self-inconsistency) are closed by (a) softening the rule-claim to 'pattern of enforcement' and flagging that no verbatim rule exists in raw-text, and (b) adding the AAO-500hPa correlation (r≈0.7-0.8) plus a daily-SD conversion showing a 3% anomaly ≈ 4-5σ extreme — which would require AAO well beyond +3σ, not +0.78σ. The three minor holes are closed with: a concrete short-window magnetic counterexample (WIN-035, PROS-005 6-day window), internal sourcing for the 'refined' label (uncounted-failures.json), and explicit acknowledgement that Domain 10's criterion is a falsification trigger not a confirmation threshold. Replacement expands one paragraph to three (412 → ~615 words) and preserves the surrounding part6 structure. No bare <h2> or new <details> wrapper; patches a single numbered paragraph.
